channel.title: Drug-Discovery on Dario Arcos-Díaz, PhD
channel.description: Recent content in Drug-Discovery on Dario Arcos-Díaz, PhD

item.title: Building a multi-agent system for drug target discovery
item.description: I built a multi-agent system in plain Python that takes a disease name and autonomously finds potential drug targets by querying public bioinformatics databases. It matched real-world pharma consensus on Alzheimer's, Parkinson's, and schizophrenia.
